discussion_comments.comment_body: This kinda feels like a bandaid (which is not a bad thing in itself), do we know why the label was being offset in the first place? Is it possible to fix the root cause?

That is correct. If we were to use straight edges and sharp corners, this would not happen. I think the non-band-aid solution is to apply the nice corners we have for elk in all graph-based diagrams as the default. This is good in case anyone wants this more aggressive bezel.
These should be converted to maps.

We should use Map here.

- Ref: https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/pull/5468
